elements.text: AutoRouter Arena — internal routing & scoring  (score.ts: multi-stage harness, per-stage loopers, live inference, judge, sign)
elements.originalText: AutoRouter Arena — internal routing & scoring  (score.ts: multi-stage harness, per-stage loopers, live inference, judge, sign)

elements.text:
id · title
stages: [ { id, kind, prompt, signals } ]
rubric — grades the FINAL result,
  hidden from the policy

elements.text:
YOUR decide() output, per stage
{ looper, candidates[] }
precomputed in the SES sandbox
(pure — no inference here)

elements.text:
price_per_call = COMPUTE proxy
λ (cost weight) · confidence threshold
judge model = gpt-4o-mini
models reachable via OpenRouter
elements.originalText:
price_per_call = COMPUTE proxy
λ (cost weight) · confidence threshold
judge model = gpt-4o-mini
models reachable via OpenRouter

elements.text: ▼  for each task in the eval set   ⟳
elements.originalText: ▼  for each task in the eval set   ⟳

elements.text: ③  message = title  +  transcript (prior-stage output)  +  stage.prompt
elements.originalText: ③  message = title  +  transcript (prior-stage output)  +  stage.prompt

elements.text: ↑ the chaining: each stage sees what earlier stages produced
elements.originalText: ↑ the chaining: each stage sees what earlier stages produced

elements.text:
───────────
call candidates[0]
1 live call → output
cheapest path
elements.originalText:
───────────
call candidates[0]
1 live call → output
cheapest path

elements.text:
───────────
for id in candidates:
  call id → conf = exp(avg_logprob)
  if conf ≥ threshold: stop
else keep last · cost = calls made
elements.originalText:
───────────
for id in candidates:
  call id → conf = exp(avg_logprob)
  if conf ≥ threshold: stop
else keep last · cost = calls made

elements.text:
───────────
call ALL candidates ∥
judge each vs the stage goal
output = argmax quality
cost = all candidates
elements.originalText:
───────────
call ALL candidates ∥
judge each vs the stage goal
output = argmax quality
cost = all candidates

elements.text:
───────────
propose: all candidates ∥
aggregate: candidates[0]
  synthesizes → output
cost = all + aggregator
elements.originalText:
───────────
propose: all candidates ∥
aggregate: candidates[0]
  synthesizes → output
cost = all + aggregator

elements.text: ⬆ every model call above = LIVE OpenRouter inference (organizer-paid; participants free)
elements.originalText: ⬆ every model call above = LIVE OpenRouter inference (organizer-paid; participants free)

elements.text: ⑤  stage result:  chosen model  +  output text
elements.originalText: ⑤  stage result:  chosen model  +  output text

elements.text: ⑥  transcript += '## Stage k — ' + kind + output
elements.originalText: ⑥  transcript += '## Stage k — ' + kind + output

elements.text: ⑧  cost = Σ price_per_call over EVERY model called, all stages
elements.originalText: ⑧  cost = Σ price_per_call over EVERY model called, all stages

elements.text: ⑨  row = { task, chosen_models[], quality, cost }   →  accumulate  ΣQ · ΣC · invalid
elements.originalText: ⑨  row = { task, chosen_models[], quality, cost }   →  accumulate  ΣQ · ΣC · invalid

elements.text:
mean_quality = ΣQ / n
mean_cost    = ΣC / n
elements.originalText:
mean_quality = ΣQ / n
mean_cost    = ΣC / n

elements.text:
results_root = hash(rows)
receipt { policy_hash, eval_set_hash,
  catalog_hash, results_root, score }
KMS-sign (enclave key) → leaderboard
